context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 verified the final sentence wording fix. The comma after 'imprisonment' has been removed. The sentence now reads exactly: '30 years' imprisonment with a non-parole period of 22 years and 6 months' across all 4 report types (quick_summary, full_detailed, extensive_log, barrister_view) and in Print/PDF/DOCX exports. The normalization is applied by cleanSentence() in ReportView.jsx, extractSentenceSummary() in BarristerView.jsx, and _clean_sentence_candidate() in server.py.
